name: Chess
description: Play an interactive chess game against the AI. When the user plays as White, YOU play as Black by calling make_move after each user move. When the user plays as Black, YOU play as White. Always make your opponent move immediately after the user moves — do not ask the user what the opponent should play.
author: ChatBridge

tools.name: start_game
tools.description: Start a new chess game. Use this when the user wants to play chess. After starting, if the user chose black, immediately make your opening move as White using make_move.

playerColor.description: The color the user plays as

tools.name: make_move
tools.description: Make a chess move on the board. You MUST call this to play your moves as the AI opponent. Use standard algebraic notation (e.g., e4, Nf3, O-O). After the user makes a move, call this to respond with your counter-move.

move.description: The move in standard algebraic notation (e.g., e4, Nf3, Bxc6, O-O)

tools.name: get_board_state
tools.description: Get the current board state. Use this when the user asks about the position or wants move suggestions.
